---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a feature or improvement for shroomio
title: "[Feature] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like.

## Motivation

Why is this feature needed? Is it related to a problem or gap in the current implementation?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the approach you'd like to see implemented.

## Alternatives Considered

Other approaches or workarounds you've thought about.

## Affected Area

- [ ] Core gameplay / simulation (`src/shared/`)
- [ ] Networking / protocol (`src/shared/protocol.h`)
- [ ] Client rendering / UI (`src/client/`)
- [ ] Server / deployment (`src/server/`)
- [ ] Build system / tooling (`Makefile`)
- [ ] Documentation (`design/`)

## Related Milestone

- [ ] M1: Online Spore Economy
- [ ] M2: Snapshot Scaling
- [ ] M3: Client-Side Smoothing
- [ ] M4: Player Identity & UX
- [ ] M5: Polish & Content
- [ ] None / new milestone

## Acceptance Criteria

What does "done" look like? List verifiable conditions.

- [ ] ...

## Additional Context

Mockups, references, links, or any other context.
